scenario.goal: introduce our manufacturing capability and ask whether they are open to reviewing a new supplier option

subject_options: Residential Hybrid Inverter Systems Supply for SunGrid Solutions
Possible Support for SunGrid Solutions' Residential Hybrid Inverter Systems Needs

drafts.version_a:
Dear Carlos,

I hope you are doing well.

I am reaching out from Shenzhen PowerNest Energy regarding our residential hybrid inverter systems and the possibility of supporting SunGrid Solutions. We understand your team is active in the Chile market. Based on the profile information provided, your business appears relevant to this offer.

Our purpose is simple: introduce our manufacturing capability and ask whether they are open to reviewing a new supplier option.

If appropriate, I can share a brief product overview, standard specifications, and a starting point for discussion.

Please let me know if you would be open to a short exchange on this.

Best regards,
Ivy
Shenzhen PowerNest Energy
drafts.version_b:
Dear Carlos,

I hope you are doing well.

I am contacting you about residential hybrid inverter systems and would like to introduce our manufacturing capability and ask whether they are open to reviewing a new supplier option.

If this is relevant for your team, I would be glad to share the next details.

Please let me know if you would be open to a short exchange on this.

Best regards,
Ivy
Shenzhen PowerNest Energy

review_notes: 建议人工复核后发送，不要把未确认信息直接写成既定事实。
邮件中涉及客户画像摘要的信息时，应核对其是否来自已确认的公开资料。
已应用输入约束：Keep the wording practical and avoid sounding too technical.
unconfirmed_fact_checklist: 确认客户画像摘要、销售切入点和任何具体需求判断都来自公开且已核实的信息。
input_signals_used: goal: introduce our manufacturing capability and ask whether they are open to reviewing a new supplier option
customer_profile_summary: Company appears active in residential solar distribution and installer support.
constraints: Keep the wording practical and avoid sounding too technical.
